description_long: This is a modern folding utility knife with a straight-edged, rectangular blade and a robust, minimalist design. The blade is matte gray with the GERBER logo printed near the handle, and it appears to be made of stainless steel. The handle is primarily black metal with a wooden inlay on one side, featuring a small gold emblem and visible screws for assembly. A black metal pocket clip is attached to one side of the handle, allowing for convenient carrying. The knife has a visible thumb stud for one-handed opening and a liner lock mechanism for safety. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for everyday carry or utility tasks.
description: A modern folding utility knife with a straight-edged blade, black metal handle, wooden inlay, and pocket clip. Features include a thumb stud, liner lock, and GERBER branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, GERBER logo, wooden inlay, gold emblem, and pocket clip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile and alignment of the blade and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the black metal handle, wooden inlay, and the absence of the GERBER logo.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the thinness and construction details of the handle and blade.
attribute_handle_design: straight handle with black metal frame, wooden inlay, pocket clip, and visible screws
